title: Architecture Registry
description: Machine-readable registry of governed components. Each entry maps a role key to its governance metadata. Governed by the structural ADR that establishes the registry.

governed_by.description: ADR that governs this registry's structure and semantics

components.description: Component entries keyed by role name

component.description: A single component in the registry

description.description: Brief description of the component's role

governance_status.description: governed = has ADR and (if applicable) spec; pre_governance = predates framework; pending = governance artefacts in progress

governing_adr.description: ADR number that governs this component (null if pre_governance)

spec.description: Path to the Gov spec for this component (null if no spec required)

sites.description: Sites where this component is deployed (project-defined site identifiers)
